description: Turn vague feature/initiative into a phased bd issue board with dependencies and test planning. Single specialist (planner, HIGH-authority). Output is an executable bd issue graph the operator dispatches subsequent chains against.

steps.title: {{root_title}}
steps.description:
PROBLEM: (the broad initiative — what we want to deliver and why)
SCOPE: {{scope}} (initial; planner may propose expansion)
NON_GOALS: NO implementation in this chain — planning only; no architecture decisions beyond what's needed for phasing.
VALIDATION: planner produces a phased bd issue board with dependencies; each phase has acceptance criteria; test planning included.
ACCEPTANCE: operator can dispatch sub-chains against the planned board.

Planning chain — turn vague into structured work graph.

steps.title: planner:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: turn root's initiative into a phased bd issue board with dependencies, test planning, and acceptance criteria per phase. HIGH planning authority.
INPUTS: root's PROBLEM + SCOPE; current codebase shape (read via grep/find/explorer-equivalent capability).
OUTPUTS: bd issues created via bd create with proper --parent/--deps; each issue has change-contract sections; phases identified; companion test issues filed. Final summary memo lists the bead-ids + phase order.
SCOPE: bd graph + design proposals; no code edits.
NON_GOALS: no implementation; no architecture lock-in beyond what's needed to phase; no test execution.
